name: recording
description: Screen recorder with audio input and system audio capture

scripts.build: bun build src/main/index.ts --outfile=dist/main/index.js --target=node --external electron --external ffmpeg-static && bun build src/preload/index.ts --outfile=dist/preload/index.cjs --target=node --external electron --format=cjs && bun build src/preload/toolbar.ts --outfile=dist/preload/toolbar.cjs --target=node --external electron --format=cjs && bun build src/renderer/index.ts --outfile=dist/renderer/index.js --target=browser && bun build src/renderer/toolbar.ts --outfile=dist/renderer/toolbar.js --target=browser && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/index.html && cp src/renderer/toolbar.html dist/renderer/toolbar.html && cp src/renderer/noise-processor.js dist/renderer/noise-processor.js
